exploration_notes: Traced the complete Kafka-Flink streaming data flow across both repositories. In Kafka: Producer.send() → Serializer → RecordAccumulator → Sender (producer path); KafkaConsumer.poll() → Deserializer → ConsumerRecord → OffsetAndMetadata/commitSync (consumer path). In Flink: Source creates SplitEnumerator (JobManager) and SourceReader (TaskManager); SourceReaderBase orchestrates SplitFetcherManager/SplitFetcher threads calling SplitReader.fetch() which wraps KafkaConsumer.poll(), producing Records
